settings.title: American API only
settings.body: We source exclusively from US-licensed manufacturers with documented synthesis chains.

settings.title: Independent third-party
settings.body: Every batch is submitted to an independent ISO-certified laboratory before release.

settings.title: Batch-level COA
settings.body: Each vial is labeled with its batch ID. The matching COA is published on the product page.

settings.title: Same-week fulfillment
settings.body: Orders placed on in-stock items ship within 2 business days from our Phoenix facility.

settings.title: Raw material sourcing
settings.body: Peptides sourced from US-licensed manufacturers with documented synthesis chains.

settings.title: In-house identity check
settings.body: Each incoming batch is logged and visually inspected before entering inventory.

settings.title: Third-party lab submission
settings.body: Samples submitted to an independent ISO-certified lab for HPLC purity analysis.

settings.title: COA review and approval
settings.body: Results reviewed against our internal acceptance criteria. Batches below threshold are rejected.

settings.title: Batch labeling
settings.body: Approved vials receive a unique batch ID traceable to the specific COA.

settings.title: Fulfillment + COA published
settings.body: Vials ship same week. The COA is published to the product page and indexed on the lab-results page.

settings.title: No proprietary blends
settings.body: Single compound at a stated concentration. No blends, no ambiguity.

settings.title: No fillers or excipients
settings.body: Lyophilized powder only. What the label says is what's in the vial.

settings.title: Published batch results
settings.body: Every batch we sell has a publicly accessible COA. If we can't show the test, we don't ship the batch.

settings.title: US-based operations
settings.body: Sourced, tested, labeled, and shipped from Phoenix, AZ. No import arbitrage.

settings.heading:
We don’t sell supplements.
We supply research-grade peptides.
settings.subhead: Every vial we ship is third-party tested, batch-labeled, and documented — before it leaves our facility.
